TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_dadiw_nu_kanatal, title = dadiw_nu_kanatal, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/dadiw_nu_kanatal} }

S.FORM: dadiw nu kanatal 國歌 nasulitan nay paybalucu'ay a kawaw nu subana'ay a pu 2018-1, nasulitan ni Tuku Sayun
S.PHON: dadiw nu kanatar~ɾ ** nasur~ɾitan naj pajbar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡaj a kawaw nu subanaʔ~ʡaj a pu ****-*, nasur~ɾitan ni tuku sajun
S.FORM: dadiw nu kanatal 國歌 nasulitan nay paybalucu'ay a kawaw nu subana'ay a pu 2018-1, nasulitan ni Tuku Sayun
S.PHON: dadiw nu kanatar~ɾ ** nasur~ɾitan naj pajbar~ɾuʦuʔ~ʡaj a kawaw nu subanaʔ~ʡaj a pu ****-*, nasur~ɾitan ni tuku sajun
